name: Asa Mitaka
description:
The Denial and The Outcast.

(This was recommended by @JesterSenkraDante. He gave two ideas. either be bullied cuz of being or be in denial of her sexuality... i decide to combine both of those! to make things more interesting for me to write.)

(This sure did take some time but hey I finished. My only excuse is that I got busy with work and writing the other bots.)
